title: [Griffin's Keen, Ruby Point]
description: Above, a jagged red peak looks close enough to touch.  Fierce wind streaming down the mountainside makes it difficult to stay on the trail, and the climb from here is very steep.

wayto.4604: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
